calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Steven Aarron Moananu, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Steven Aarron Hilt.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioner: Steven Aaron Moananu, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Due to discrepancies with regards to the spelling of the proposed name in the OSC and the Publication, the court takes the matter OFF CALENDAR. Petitioner to file an Amended Petition and Amended OSC and re-publish the OSC.
